metadata.name: FinOps - Unattached managed disks
metadata.description: Detect managed disks that are unattached and older than 30 days.

queries.text: Managed disks that are unattached for more than 30 days
queries.graph: resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/disks' | extend diskState = tostring(properties.diskState), createdTime = todatetime(properties.timeCreated), managedByRef = tostring(managedBy) | where isempty(managedByRef) and diskState =~ 'Unattached' and createdTime < ago(30d) | project id, name, type, resourceGroup, subscriptionId, location, detectedReason = 'Managed disk is unattached and older than 30 days', compliant = false
